job_description:
# Senior Data Analyst - Remote
Company: UnitedHealth Group / Optum
Source: Official company careers page
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 30, 2026
URL: https://careers.unitedhealthgroup.com/job/eden-prairie/senior-data-analyst-remote/34088/94259827424

## Highlights
- Posted April 22, 2026; requisition 2345433.
- Business & Data Analytics role focused on structured data management, BI tools, trend analysis, normalization, data quality, dashboards, visualizations, decision aids, and stakeholder analytics.
- Requires 6+ years as Business Analyst or Data Analyst, 6+ years with relational databases such as SQL/Oracle, 2+ years BI visualization, 2+ years Alteryx or SSIS, and expert SQL.
- Remote flexibility within the U.S.; Minneapolis or Washington, DC hires have an office requirement.
strengths: Strong alignment with 7+ years of data/ETL analysis, SQL, data quality, BI/reporting, and stakeholder support.
Optum healthcare environment maps to payer operations and healthcare analytics experience.
SSIS/BI requirements map truthfully to SSIS exposure and Power BI/Tableau experience.
gaps: Alteryx is not supported by the base resume and should be listed as a gap.
Role has senior/mentor language; keep resume focused on QA library, defect triage, and cross-functional leadership without implying formal people management.
notes: Apply first. Strong healthcare analytics and SQL match. Tailor headline and summary toward senior data analyst, data quality, SQL, BI, and healthcare reporting.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Senior Data Analyst | Healthcare Analytics | SQL & Data Quality

replacements.find: Power BI, Tableau, Excel (advanced – pivots, lookups, Power Query)
replacements.replace: Power BI, Tableau, Excel (advanced pivots, lookups, Power Query), BI reporting validation
